description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, ergonomic stock. The body is constructed primarily from metal with polymer components, including a thumbhole stock and a pistol grip for improved handling. The rifle is equipped with iron sights mounted on the top rail, and the barrel is relatively short, ending in a prominent muzzle brake. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted just ahead of the stock, and the overall build suggests a modern, urban combat application. The surface is mostly smooth with some grippy, textured areas on the grip and stock for secure handling. The rifle's design emphasizes portability, control, and rapid deployment in close-quarters environments.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a thumbhole stock, iron sights, and a short barrel with a muzzle brake. Features ergonomic grips and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle brake, barrel opening, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thumbhole stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's shape, grip texture, and the alignment of the top rail and sights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, stock, and additional details of the receiver and barrel.
